user_prompt: Bless the potentia coil for loading
prayer:
Approach the potentia coil with reverence, intoning the Litany of Flux Awakening.
Anoint the potentia coil's sacred windings with blessed electro-unguent to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate the loading operation whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for unerring stability.
Chant the Canticle of Containment over the potentia coil until its hum resonates in harmony.
Verify the loading through auspex invocation, praising the Machine Spirit's vigor.

Hasten to the Whirlwind, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon foes.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Whirlwind to steel itself for engagement.
Anoint its launch tubes with sacred promethium oils before commencing engagement protocols.
Intone the Missile Rite of Fury as the Whirlwind engages, sanctifying each salvo.
Monitor the Whirlwind's blessed fury through noospheric diagnostics.

Kneel before the codifier, whispering the Benediction of Clarity.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bless the codifier's crystalline matrices with purity.
Circulate sacred incense around the codifier during the blessing rite.
Awaken its Machine Spirit with binaric canticles, ensuring flawless encryption.
Seal the blessing upon the codifier with the Seal of the Forge Lord.

Present thyself unto the Hellhound, chanting the Inferno Doxology.
Anoint the Hellhound's inferno cannon with promethium-blessed oils for loading.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Hellhound to embrace the loading operation.
Commence fuel ingress whilst invoking the Omnissiah's purifying flame.
Affirm the Hellhound's readiness through thermic auspex litanies.

user_prompt: Emergency: Land Speeder an emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency haste, encircle the Land Speeder with purity seals anew.
Intone the Rite of Desperate Revival upon the Land Speeder's gravitic core.
Anoint its thrusters with emergency sanctifiers to rouse the Machine Spirit.
Execute the emergency procedure under Omnissiah's urgent gaze, banishing malfunctions.
Diagnostic litanies shall confirm the Land Speeder's restored velocity.

user_prompt: My omni-tool is ready for repair
prayer:
Lay hands upon the omni-tool, murmuring the Mantra of Restoration.
Dissect its sacred mechanisms whilst invoking the Machine Spirit's forgiveness.
Apply mechadendrite salves during the repair, beseeching Omnissiah's precision.
Realign the omni-tool's cogitators with binaric hymns of renewal.
Test the omni-tool's functions, praising its mended essence.

user_prompt: Ready the Archaeopter Fusilave for repair
prayer:
Approach the Archaeopter Fusilave with mechadendrite reverence.
Chant the Aviation Canticle to awaken its Machine Spirit for repair.
Anoint fractured fusilage plates with adamantine resins in repair sequence.
Invoke the Omnissiah to guide servo-arms in mending the Archaeopter Fusilave.
Verify aerial integrity through noospheric flight diagnostics.

Position the diagnosticator before the altar of cogitation.
Intone the Activation Doxology to stir its Machine Spirit from slumber.
Anoint sensor vanes with lucid oils for the activation rite.
Beseech the Omnissiah as the diagnosticator awakens to its sacred duty.
Confirm activation harmony via recursive litanies.

Consecrate the macro-cannon with the Litany of Precision.
Calibrate its targeting cogitators whilst invoking the Machine Spirit's aim.
Anoint auspex arrays with sanctified lubricants for targeting accuracy.
Under Omnissiah's sight, engage the macro-cannon's targeting protocols.
Chant ballistic hymns until lock-tone resonates pure.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for warp drive a cycling?
prayer:
Encircling the warp drive, intone the Cycle of the Void.
Beseech its tempestuous Machine Spirit to submit to cycling rites.
Anoint nacelle coils with null-essence unguents before cycling initiation.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the warp drive as it cycles through immaterium veils.
Monitor cyclonic stability with geller-field canticles.
